name: momentum-ds
description: Design System for Academy Digital Products - Web & Mobile

scripts.build: npm run build:tokens && npm run build:components && npm run build:react && npm run build:rn
scripts.test: npm run test:tokens && npm run test:components && npm run test:rn
scripts.test:tokens: cd packages/tokens && npm run test 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test:components: cd packages/components && npm run test 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test:rn: cd packages/rn && npm run test 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:tokens && npm run type-check:rn
scripts.type-check:tokens: cd packages/tokens && npm run type-check 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.figma:connect: echo 'Set up Figma Code Connect in .figma directory'
scripts.figma:sync: echo 'Configure Figma token sync in tools/figma-sync'
